metadata.name: Notify Residents of Road Closure for a Parade

description: The city has approved a parade. An operator must notify residents and businesses along the route of upcoming road closures.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved parade route and the schedule for road closures.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the geographic route and timing details.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all residential and commercial addresses along the parade route.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of all affected properties.

nodes.task_description: Send a targeted notification email or text message to all affected addresses about the closures.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the targeted alert.
